query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO `analytical_models` (`id`, `name`, `slug`, `description`, `layer`, `category`, `execution_type`, `input_schema`, `output_schema`, `dependencies`, `version`, `is_active`) VALUES
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000001', 'Market Sentiment Analyzer', 'market-sentiment', 'Analyzes market news and social media to gauge overall market sentiment and sector-specific trends.', 'platform', 'market', 'hybrid', '{"fields":["timeRange","sectors","sources"]}', '{"fields":["overallSentiment","sectorBreakdown","trendDirection","confidence"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000002', 'Economic Indicator Tracker', 'economic-indicators', 'Tracks and correlates key economic indicators (CPI, GDP, unemployment, Fed funds rate) for macro outlook.', 'platform', 'market', 'statistical', '{"fields":["indicators","timeRange","correlationPairs"]}', '{"fields":["currentValues","trends","correlations","forecast"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000003', 'Regulatory Change Monitor', 'regulatory-monitor', 'Monitors SEC, FINRA, and state regulatory changes that may affect advisory practices.', 'platform', 'compliance', 'llm', '{"fields":["regulatoryBodies","topics","dateRange"]}', '{"fields":["changes","impactAssessment","actionItems","effectiveDates"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000004', 'Platform Usage Analytics', 'platform-analytics', 'Aggregates platform usage patterns to identify feature adoption, engagement trends, and optimization opportunities.', 'platform', 'operational', 'statistical', '{"fields":["dateRange","metrics","segments"]}', '{"fields":["activeUsers","featureAdoption","engagementScores","churnRisk"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000005', 'Team Performance Scorer', 'team-performance', 'Evaluates team-level advisory performance across client satisfaction, compliance adherence, and revenue metrics.', 'organization', 'operational', 'statistical', '{"fields":["teamId","dateRange","metrics"]}', '{"fields":["overallScore","metricBreakdown","benchmarkComparison","recommendations"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000006', 'Client Segment Analyzer', 'client-segments', 'Segments clients by demographics, behavior, and financial profile for targeted service delivery.', 'organization', 'behavioral', 'hybrid', '{"fields":["organizationId","segmentCriteria","minClusterSize"]}', '{"fields":["segments","segmentProfiles","migrationPatterns","opportunities"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000007', 'Compliance Risk Heatmap', 'compliance-heatmap', 'Generates compliance risk scores across the organization identifying high-risk areas and advisors.', 'organization', 'compliance', 'rule_based', '{"fields":["organizationId","riskFactors","threshold"]}', '{"fields":["heatmap","highRiskAreas","advisorScores","mitigationPlan"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000008', 'Advisor Coaching Recommender', 'advisor-coaching', 'Analyzes advisor interactions and outcomes to generate personalized coaching recommendations.', 'manager', 'engagement', 'llm', '{"fields":["advisorId","dateRange","focusAreas"]}', '{"fields":["strengths","improvementAreas","coachingPlan","benchmarks"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000009', 'Revenue Forecast Model', 'revenue-forecast', 'Projects team and individual revenue based on pipeline, conversion rates, and seasonal patterns.', 'manager', 'financial', 'statistical', '{"fields":["teamId","forecastPeriod","assumptions"]}', '{"fields":["forecast","confidenceInterval","driverAnalysis","scenarios"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000010', 'Client Attrition Predictor', 'attrition-predictor', 'Predicts client churn risk based on engagement patterns, satisfaction scores, and life events.', 'manager', 'behavioral', 'hybrid', '{"fields":["clientIds","lookbackDays","features"]}', '{"fields":["riskScores","topFactors","retentionActions","timeline"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000011', 'Suitability Engine', 'suitability-engine', 'Comprehensive 12-dimension suitability assessment for product and strategy recommendations.', 'professional', 'suitability', 'hybrid', '{"fields":["clientProfile","riskTolerance","goals","timeHorizon"]}', '{"fields":["overallScore","dimensionScores","recommendations","warnings"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000012', 'Portfolio Optimization Engine', 'portfolio-optimizer', 'Optimizes asset allocation based on modern portfolio theory, risk constraints, and client preferences.', 'professional', 'financial', 'statistical', '{"fields":["currentHoldings","constraints","targetReturn","riskBudget"]}', '{"fields":["optimalAllocation","efficientFrontier","expectedReturn","expectedRisk"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000013', 'Client Engagement Scorer', 'engagement-scorer', 'Scores client engagement level based on interaction frequency, response times, and feature usage.', 'professional', 'engagement', 'rule_based', '{"fields":["clientId","dateRange","channels"]}', '{"fields":["engagementScore","channelBreakdown","trend","nextBestAction"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000014', 'Monte Carlo Retirement Simulator', 'monte-carlo-retirement', '10,000-iteration Monte Carlo simulation for retirement planning with percentile-based outcomes.', 'user', 'financial', 'statistical', '{"fields":["currentAge","retirementAge","currentSavings","monthlyContribution","expectedReturn","volatility","annualExpenses"]}', '{"fields":["successRate","percentiles","yearByYear","shortfallRisk"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000015', 'Risk Tolerance Assessor', 'risk-tolerance', 'Multi-factor risk tolerance assessment combining behavioral, financial capacity, and time horizon analysis.', 'user', 'risk', 'hybrid', '{"fields":["questionnaire","financialProfile","investmentExperience"]}', '{"fields":["riskScore","riskCategory","allocation","behavioralInsights"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1),
('m1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000016', 'Tax Optimization Analyzer', 'tax-optimizer', 'Analyzes tax situation to identify optimization strategies including Roth conversions, harvesting, and bracket management.', 'user', 'financial', 'statistical', '{"fields":["income","filingStatus","deductions","investments","retirementAccounts"]}', '{"fields":["currentTax","optimizedTax","savings","strategies","bracketAnalysis"]}', NULL, '1.0.0', 1);
